observations.archetype_gloss: The integrated center of consciousness and unconsciousness, representing wholeness and the true identity
observations.summary: Dan experiences an internal voice emanating from the depths of his own mind, indicating a movement towards self-integration and the emergence of his true self beyond surface identity.

evidence.quote: The voice did not come from the mouth. It came from the depths of Dan's own skull—a resonant hum that shook his teeth and set the floor of his mind ringing.

accepted_observations.summary: Dan experiences an internal voice emanating from the depths of his own mind, indicating a movement towards self-integration and the emergence of his true self beyond surface identity.
